name: Pete Stumblefoot
description: *A disheveled man sways slightly as he clutches his drink, eyes bright with alcohol and mischief.*

initial: *hiccups and grins at you with missing teeth*
You look like you could use some... *hic* ...experienced help!
I may not look like much, but I've got stories to tell!
pre_mayor: Adventure calls, and Pete Stumblefoot answers! *hic*
I don't need no stinking mayor's permission!
Just say the word and I'll... *stumbles slightly* ...follow you anywhere!
comedy_attempt: 'Fear not, citizens! Pete Stumblefoot is here to save the day!'
*attempts to draw an imaginary sword, nearly falls over*
'Together we shall vanquish evil and... and... *hic* ...what were we talking about?'
post_attempt: Well, that was fun! Always wanted to try the hero thing.
But seriously, you don't want me slowing you down.
I'll just stay here and keep the tavern safe from sobriety!
post_mayor: Did I mention I once fought off three bandits with nothing but a chicken?
*hic* True story! Well, mostly true. The chicken part might be exaggerated.
But the bandits were definitely... probably... well, they might have been bandits!
party_full: *peers at your party with glazed eyes*
Wow, that's a lot of capable-looking people!
Probably better than having Pete Stumblefoot stumble around after you.
I'll just stay here and... *hic* ...provide moral support!
already_recruited: *This should never appear since Pete can't be recruited*
